verdict.answer_first: B states the actionable answer in sentence 1: "Short version: default to REST"; A also answers early but with softer framing: "start with REST unless..."
verdict.decisiveness: B commits more directly: "My recommendation for you: start with REST"; A adds more table/options before ending with "REST + a couple of BFF endpoints."
verdict.actionability: B is easier to act on right now because it gives the default, exceptions, and migration path concisely: "start with REST... add a GraphQL layer later... or a backend-for-frontend endpoint"
